hero_sub: Because you've already tried the apps, the courses, and the textbooks. You learned a lot of English. You just didn't get many chances to use it. Speexify is the chance.
problem_subtitle: The cycle most people get stuck in.
problem_card1_text: You've studied since school. You read English fine. You watch shows without subtitles. But the moment you actually have to speak in an interview, a meeting, a phone call, the words pause.
problem_card2_title: Apps that don't show up at work.
problem_card2_text: Your streak is impressive. The vocabulary list grows every week. But when the meeting starts, none of it helps. Streaks aren't reps.
problem_card3_title: Classrooms that don't fit a workday.
problem_card3_text: A schedule that doesn't move. A curriculum built for someone abstract. A pace set by the slowest person in the room. You're an adult with a job. That's not how you learn anymore.
value1_desc: We don't teach you what to think. We give you somewhere to say what you already know. Out loud, with a coach in the room.
value1_detail: Every session is built around your real life. The interview next month. The meeting on Tuesday. The conversation you've been rehearsing in your head. That's the practice plan.
value2_desc: Every session is a real conversation, not a drill. The reps build the confidence.
value2_detail: Coaches don't lecture. They listen, push, and respond in real time. The pace adjusts to what you actually need on that day. There's no script.
value3_title: We've been in the room you're afraid of.
value3_desc: The hesitation. The translating. The freeze before you speak. Familiar. Survivable. Practiced through, with someone who's been there.
value3_detail: Every Speexify coach has been on both sides of the room. They've sat through the interview, led the meeting, closed the deal, in a language that wasn't theirs first. That experience is in the room with you.
value4_desc: We don't track how many days in a row you logged in. We track what you actually use the language for.
value4_detail: The interview you landed. The call you stopped dreading. The presentation that landed. The promotion that followed. Those are the only metrics that matter. And they're what we measure.
how_subtitle: Coach, sessions, plan, schedule. That's it.
how_point1_text: Not random. We pick the coach whose background, style, and voice fit what you're trying to do.
how_point2_text: Real conversations, not scripts. The session adjusts to where you actually are, not where a textbook says you should be.
how_point3_text: What you practiced. What got better. What's next. A record of your reps, not a generic completion summary.
how_point4_text: Book when you're ready. Reschedule when life happens. Your spot stays. No penalties.
proof1_quote: I used to mute myself on calls. Now I'm usually the one running them. The English was always there. I just had nowhere to actually use it.
proof2_quote: Two months here did more than ten years of studying. The difference: I was actually speaking, every session.
proof3_quote: The interview I landed had three rounds. I'd practiced the second one out loud, twice, with my coach. It showed.
cta_sub: Book your first session. Try the practice ground. The first one is on us.
